signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Holds Until April 22 Amid Signals of Imminent Second Round of Talks in Islamabad, Trump Says Conflict
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Holds Until April 22 Amid Signals of Imminent Second Round of Talks in Islamabad, Trump Says Conflict 'Close to Over'** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

President Trump stated the US-Iran conflict is "very close to being over" and new negotiations could resume within days, potentially hosted again by Pakistan after initial Islamabad talks failed[1][2][3].

signals.headline: HEADLINE:** XRP records largest weekly inflows, unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
HEADLINE:** XRP records largest weekly inflows, unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence

XRP led digital asset investment products with $119.6 million in inflows last week (as of April 8, 2026), its strongest weekly haul since mid-December 2025[4]. This institutional interest surge, combined with a U.S.–Iran ceasefire announcement, drove XRP up 5.52% to $1.38 in 24 hours[4].
